package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_accepts_gin_context: Repositories that accept `*gin.Context` rather than `context.Context`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule122NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule122NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule122NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario122Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule122NegativeService, input Rule122NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
